name: Pennsylvania Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Pennsylvania - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description: Prometric, PA Nurse Aide Registry, 7941 Corporate Drive, Nottingham, MD 21090

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

mainEntity.name: Who administers the Pennsylvania CNA exam?

acceptedAnswer.text: The PA nurse aide competency exam is administered by Credentia. Register at credentia.com/test-takers/pa.

mainEntity.name: How do I transfer my CNA to Pennsylvania?

acceptedAnswer.text: Submit a reciprocity application through Credentia's CNA365 platform online, or mail the NNAAP Registration Application for Enrollment by Reciprocity to: Credentia – PA Nurse Aide Registry, PO Box 13785, Philadelphia, PA 19101-3785.
Yes, Pennsylvania CNA reciprocity is free.

mainEntity.name: How do I verify a Pennsylvania CNA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use the Credentia CNA365 platform or call Credentia support at (888) 204-6249. You can also call PA DOH at (800) 852-0518.
